column1: # Sweep 16 — MATRIX_LR probe on locked config (2026-04-20)
# Default MATRIX_LR=0.022 (SOTA). Pre-campaign data found gains at higher values but results
#   AGX  (6L×512d, SP3072): best at 0.034 in fine bracket
#   AGX  (8L×576d, SP3072): 0.030 HURT vs 0.025 — architecture matters
# Current config is SOTA 11L U-Net (SP8192) — never probed. Signal is real but peak unknown.
# Bracket wider than Nano suggested: 0.022 (baseline) through 0.034, 6 points.
# All runs use full locked config: QK=5.5 WD=0.64 TTT+sliding EMA=0.995 SOFTCAP=20
